parsed_output.justification: In the transcript, the only concrete indication that a player may have a werewolf alignment comes from Justin’s statements about a trouble‑maker card in the center and his self‑confessions of different roles.  Justin’s multiple self‑claims (“I was the Seer,” “I think we kill Paul”) illustrate confusion and inconsistency that are characteristic of a player who has reached an unexpected role—a possible werewolf.  Moreover, he consistently talks about other players (Paul, Mike) which may be attempts to divert suspicion, a tactic commonly used by werewolves.
